# discord_channels (Data Source)

Fetches all channels of a Discord guild (server).

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "discord_channels" "all" {
  server_id = "123456789012345678"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `server_id` (String) Snowflake ID of the guild.

### Read-Only

- `channels` (Attributes List) Channels of the guild. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--channels))

<a id="nestedatt--channels"></a>
### Nested Schema for `channels`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String) Snowflake ID of the channel.
- `name` (String) Channel name.
- `nsfw` (Boolean) Whether the channel is age-restricted.
- `parent_id` (String) Snowflake ID of the parent category.
- `position` (Number) Sorting position of the channel.
- `topic` (String) Channel topic.
- `type` (Number) Channel type.
